历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2023, the minimum science ranking was approximately 7914 → 6080 → 7800, with significant fluctuations; in 2024, Guizhou Province implemented the first new Gaokao (Physics Category), and the ranking dropped significantly to 9935, remaining roughly stable at 9762 in 2025. In the past two years, the Physics Category ranking has shifted back by about 2000 positions compared to the original science model, with a baseline of approximately 9762 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guizhou Province: 64 in 2021, 61 in 2022, 60 in 2023, 62 in 2024, 65 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 91, a significant 40% increase compared to 2025, which notably alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 66th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable range of 65–76 in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of finance and economics institutions; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion incidents; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 92nd, rated as average, with moderate exposure on short video platforms; Applied Economics A+ (top in the country), Business Administration A, Statistics A-, with a total of 3 A- and above disciplines, highlighting strong strength in finance and economics; additionally, the university offers interdisciplinary fields such as Computer Science, Statistics, and Financial Technology in the Physics Category, benefiting from the disciplinary support of Applied Economics and Statistics.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science is recommended as slightly hot, Electronic Information/Communication as very hot, and Electrical Engineering and Automation as very hot; these popular majors account for a significant proportion of the Physics Category enrollment plan (Computer Science 14, Statistics 6, etc.), potentially attracting more high-scoring candidates; the total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is 299,000, estimated at about 209,300 for Physics Category based on the recent proportion of approximately 70%, roughly unchanged from 2025; Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, adjacent to Guizhou, with strong regional preference; the university's enrollment proportion in this province is about 1.5%–3.6%, at a medium level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the overall shift back of about 2000 positions in historical rankings after the new Gaokao, the significant alleviation of competition due to the 40% enrollment expansion in 2026, the roughly unchanged number of candidates in the province, and the stable reputation of the university, but the expansion of popular majors like Computer Science in the Physics Category may attract more high-scoring candidates, creating a counterbalance; based on the 2025 baseline of 9762, the ranking is expected to shift back significantly; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 12155, with a range of 11655–12655.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2023, the minimum ranking for liberal arts was approximately 1336 → 1184 → 1232, with small fluctuations; in 2024, the first year of the new Gaokao in Guizhou Province (History Category), the ranking significantly dropped to 2762, and rebounded to 2313 in 2025. In recent years, the ranking for History Category has shifted back by about 1000 positions compared to the original liberal arts model, with a baseline of approximately 2313 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Guizhou Province: 38 in 2021, 38 in 2022, 39 in 2023, 39 in 2024, 36 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 41, an increase of about 13.9% compared to 2025, a significant expansion that alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 66th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 65–76 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of finance and economics institutions; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion incidents; ranked 92nd in comprehensive Douyin popularity, with average evaluation, moderate exposure on short video platforms, and no obvious signs of increased application attention; Applied Economics A+ (top in the country), Business Administration A, Statistics A-, with a total of 3 A- and above disciplines, strong finance and economics disciplines, which have a strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of finance/finance/economics majors shows a differentiated wait-and-see trend, accounting/finance/auditing majors are recommended as relatively hot, law is differentiated wait-and-see; the total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is 299,000, estimated at about 90,600 based on the recent History Category proportion of about 30%, roughly the same as 2025; Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, adjacent to Guizhou, with strong regional preference; the university's enrollment proportion in the province is about 1.5%–3.6%, at a medium level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the trend of historical rankings shifting back by about 1000 positions after the new Gaokao, the alleviation of competition due to the planned enrollment expansion of about 13.9% in 2026, the basically unchanged number of candidates in the province, the stable reputation of the university, and the differentiated popularity of finance and economics majors, the ranking is expected to shift back slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 2313; the predicted minimum ranking is about 2526, with a range of 2071–2981.
